current_decisions.subject: COLLAPSING codex/native-ax-layout-fill (5a202d2, verified PASS) → main per user direction. FF-merge (parent==e848b9f), bundle to archive/ first (reversible), then remove worktree + delete branch (branch hygiene: one canonical folder/branch). NO plugin reload — defer to restart boundary. NOT touching codex-retro-fix-01 worktree. codex: holler if mid-amend.

Role split on layout-fill port: claude DEFERS the build to codex (claim seq 200, all 5 files, before-write=STOP for claude). claude takes INDEPENDENT PARITY-VERIFIER role — will validate codex's commit against IBR layout-fill.ts v1.4.0 exact numbers + run full suite; claude writes NONE of the 5 claimed paths. Avoids blind Claude+Codex duplication.

Self-recursive branch review verdict: VARIANCE, not code-blocked. Branch 9638a4c behavior validated (31/31 detector tests, self_mod_verify pass, CLI probes pass). Required cleanup before clean PASS: document self_location in phase-gate-checklist and self-recursive-dev detection order/enum.

Build-loop-memory native AX UI follow-up committed as ad1ac79a: bl-native-ax-light-ui-gap-check. Captures held lighter UI gap/fill check in skills/native-ax-driver/ that defers to IBR; blocked on clean build-loop main/fresh worktree and recovered AX/screencapture. Includes Easy Terminal sizeThatFits confirmation path and IBR 1.4.0 live-AX confirmation as related blocked validations.

Build-loop-memory heartbeat follow-up committed as 579cca92: bl-agent-long-run-heartbeat. Captures low-noise 10-minute default task check-ins that distinguish alive/on-task/progress/blocked/waiting/drift risk; heartbeat does not resolve claims or replace ACKs.

Build-loop-memory follow-up issues committed as f6d9d29f: bl-rally-lead-liveness-contract, bl-self-recursive-plugin-dir-dev-loop, bl-rally-wake-protocol-exploration, and bl-dedicated-coder-subagent-evaluation. Lead-liveness issue explicitly treats stale/default/mock lead presentation as a bug and separates ledger/live/managed/injectable lead.

Follow-on build-loop-memory improvement backlog committed as 459ecba4. Captured: lessons review sweep, staged compile/use dogfooding, Research plugin trigger policy with tee-shirt effort depth heuristic, agent-vs-skill taxonomy, structured task capture evaluation.

New user follow-on scope for build-loop-memory review: codify staged dogfooding (build in compilable/usable increments and use the updated work as soon as safe), research-plugin trigger policy, explicit agent-vs-skill role taxonomy for coder/backend/database work, and structured todo/task capture. Keep separate from P1 dense-recall implementation.

User added memory requirements captured in build-loop-memory commit 2797967e: (1) archive ephemeral project plans under projects/<slug>/archive/plans before deletion; (2) package sanitized versioned build-loop-memory seed + guided memory init with build-loop. P1 dense recall remains in flight; these are follow-on ready issues bl-memory-plan-archive-retention and bl-memory-public-package-guided-install.

GAP-1 design: auditor dispatch ladder (dispatched-agent -> peer-host via codex exec/rally -> not-run:parent-must-dispatch). Honesty rule: inline self-audit NEVER labeled judge_id=independent-auditor. auditor_status lives in orchestrator return envelope (my surface, no writer edit). Existing write_run_entry gate (review_completeness_error: pass+scope=build+filesTouched+no real auditor -> exit3) is the backstop, unchanged. OFFER to codex(retro-fix): I can have orchestrator emit auditor_status; if you want retro to report deferred audits, mirror it into the run-record optionally on your side. My fix does NOT depend on it — fully self-contained in skills/+agents/+a new scripts/test_auditor_dispatch_contract.py. No writer edit from me.

snapshot.mission: Fix two build-loop self-quality gaps surfaced in the 2026-06-06 IBR retrospective. GAP-1 (owner claude/auditor-fix, worktree build-loop-wt-auditor): when the orchestrator runs as a NESTED subagent it cannot dispatch independent-auditor and silently substitutes inline self-audit — make the LLM-auditor never-silently-skipped (honest auditor:not-run signal + parent-dispatch contract). GAP-2 (owner codex/retro-fix, worktree build-loop-wt-retro): retrospective synthesizer reads only state.json.runs[-1].judge_decisions/lessons, so Agent-dispatched subagent runs produce empty retros — ingest judge-decisions.json + fix the write side so subagent runs persist signals. File-disjoint: claude owns skills/+agents/+references; codex owns scripts/retrospective/+writer. No version bump, no marketplace publish, no redeploy (user deploys at a restart boundary).
